explanation: When the robot is proceeding as normal (proceed), the explanations are minimal (concise). However, if something goes wrong (unexpectedCondition), detailed explanations (detailed) are provided. This is captured by ensuring that when things are normal, the explanations are concise, but when there's an unexpected condition, more detail is required.

If the robot's actions proceed without deviation from the expected plan (noDeviations), the explanation should remain minimal (concise). However, if a deviation occurs (planDeviation), the robot should switch to providing a detailed explanation (detailed). This ensures good understanding of situation.

If the robot is following a planned path correctly (followPath), the explanation remains concise (concise), but if there is unexpected behavior (unexpectedBehaviour), it ensures switching to a more detailed explanation mode (detailed).

In situations where the robot is in a normal operating condition and self-assured of its plan (selfRecoveryExists & proceed), explanations remain concise (concise). If unexpected conditions arise (unexpectedCondition), the scope expands to detailed (detailed).

Ensuring that if a mission is ongoing without any critical signals or issues (mission & !unexpectedCondition), explanations are concise (concise); otherwise, they should become detailed (detailed) to address unforeseen situations.

While continuing the normal plan when no errors are detected (proceed & !failureDetected), explanations are minimal (concise). If errors are detected (failureDetected), it demands detailed explanations (detailed) to clarify issues.

By conditionally switching modes, when there is no indication of an unexpected obstacle (proceed & !unexpectedObstacle), being minimal (concise) is sufficient. If an obstacle arises (unexpectedObstacle), detailed explanations (detailed) become necessary.

The robot should provide concise explanations when there is no update expected (noDeviations) or discrepancy (unexpectedCondition), but when an update or issue is detected, explanations should infer more details (detailed).

Operating under typical procedures (proceed & noDeviations), the explanation remains succinct (concise). Contrastingly, encountering something unexpected like an error or obstacle (unexpectedCondition) renders a detailed (detailed) explanation imperative.

Under normal operation (proceed & pathPlanning), maintain brevity in explanations (concise). In exceptional cases where planning disruptions may occur (unexpectedCondition or pathImpossible), provide elaborate details (detailed).

So long as everything is proceeding without deviation (proceed & noDeviations), minimal explanation (concise). However, if deviations occur (planDeviation or unexpectedCondition), detailed (detailed) explanations need to be provided.

The robot focuses on minimal output (concise) during usual behavior (proceed & normalCondition). Shifts to detailed explanation (detailed) occur upon unexpected behavior facts being detected (unexpectedCondition).

Persisting the existing course (proceed) with no anomaly detected (noAnomalies), maintaining brief explanations (concise). Conversely, disrupting anomalies (unexpectedCondition) ensure that explanations evolve to be detailed (detailed).

Inundated with normal operations with no obstacle detected (proceed & !unexpectedObstacle), the explanation should remain brief (concise). Encountering obstacles changes this to detailed (detailed) for better clarity.

When the robot operates with intended conditions (normalOperation) and if deviation occurs, more details in explainers should be furnished (detailed). This captures when expected timeframe procedural moves smoothly.

Operating within normal actions (proceed & noDeviations) should keep explanations as minimal (concise) but rise to detailed (detailed) once deviation or any setback happens (unexpectedCondition or problemDetected).

The robot should begin by giving concise explanations (concise) when actions are proceeding normally (proceed & noDeviations), switching to a detailed mode only if the course changes drastically (unexpectedCondition).

Adequacy is determined by how freely activities proceed (proceed). If proceeding without any disruptions, remain concise (concise); however, any disruption (unexpectedCondition), requires the expansion to detailed (detailed) disclosures.

If the robot's path has the intended correctness (followPath & !unexpectedBehaviour), avoid detail (concise). The introduction of errors or changes requires a switch to detailed explanatory measures (detailed).

For execution with no sign of failure (proceed & !failureDetected), the explanation is brief (concise). If any issue is determined (failureDetected), facilitate detailed explanation handles (detailed) for high clarity.

A consistent and correct plan following (proceed & noDeviations), can reasonably keep explanations compact (concise), but upon encountering any risk of error (unexpectedCondition), conform more thoroughly detailed commentary (detailed).

While continuation should suffice under explained understood actions (proceed & noAnomalies), explanation brevity (concise) prevails, whereas any issue signal demands detail (detailed) for enhanced understanding.

When the robot has a verified normal action plan (proceed) without deviation or obstacle (noDeviations & !pathImpossible), concise form (concise) is fine. But as deviations are detected, expanded explanations (detailed) are required.

While continuing the usual approach (proceed) that signals no deviations (noDeviations) remains concise (concise), if experiencing any obstacle or deviation (unexpectedObstacle or planDeviation), provide a detailed explanation (detailed).

In common operating condition (proceed & missioncomplete), minimal explanations (concise) persist, albeit encountering unforeseen issues (unexpectedCondition), encouraging a shift to detailed (detailed) explanations to address the issue.

Assuring that regular activities (proceed & pathPlanning) are maintained, keeping explanations brief (concise) is justified. In contrast, detecting a pathing or unexpected issue (unexpectedCondition), imparts more detail (detailed).

Explanations remaining minimal (concise) when normally operating (proceed) should be standard, yet under path impossibility or unexpected detection (pathImpossible or unexpectedCondition), shifting to detailed (detailed) becomes essential.

In normal operations (proceed & noDeviations) to be concise (concise), ensuring unexpected situations or deviations (unexpectedCondition or planDeviation) result in more scrutiny explanations (detailed).

The robot offers concise reply (concise) during regular navigation (proceed & !planDeviation) but as deviations initiate (unexpectedCondition), this transforms to more information-rich responses required (detailed).

Proceeding under stable conditions with no unexpected risks or deviations (proceed & noDeviations) keeps the output concise (concise), whereas encountering any unexpected assumes a detailed explanation (detailed).

Under the premise that error detection or anomaly was absent (proceed & !unexpectedCondition), keeping explanations concise (concise) is reasonable. In situations where issues are involved, escalate to more detailed discourse (detailed).

By conducting ongoing mission with well expected flow (proceed & mission & !unexpectedCondition), explanations maintain simplicity (concise), notwithstanding if course changes unexpectedly, detailed provisions (detailed) are triggered.

Until a disturbance appears (proceed & !unexpectedCondition & !planDeviation), maintaining concise (concise) explanations can be standard; contrary to proceeding irregularity with path deviation calls a switch to detail (detailed).
When on-task with minimal errors (proceed & !unexpectedCondition), the idea is concise (concise) feedback. If a risk or error emerges, explanations need more depth (detailed).

Executing a mission normally with no changes (proceed & noDeviations) translates to simpler feedback (concise). If the mission state shifts into unpredictability, all communication transcends to detailed (detailed).

Under regular pathing and planning conditions (proceed & noDeviations), concise (concise) communication suffices till upheaval appears (unexpectedCondition). At that stage, rigorous explanations (detailed) are demanded.

Limiting explanation in continuation of correctly functioning processes (proceed & !unexpectedCondition) whereas spontaneous changes or malfunctions (unexpectedCondition) make detailed clarification (detailed) necessary.

In settings where path navigation comes equipped with the asset of obstacle knowledge (proceed & !unexpectedObstacle), output remains minimal (concise). Yet, when inaugurated over new obstacle (unexpectedObstacle), detailed insight (detailed) evolves.

While handling mission without disturbance (proceed & missioncomplete), the exchange is brief (concise). Upon occurrence of unpredictable context adjustments (unexpectedCondition), it shifts to thorough detail (detailed).
When standard planning maintenance is confirmed (proceed & !pathImpossible), shorthand approach (concise) applies; encountering fiascos demands reconsidered conveying (detailed) to improve details.

Pursuing the route within expected bounds (proceed & followPath) aligns with concise (concise) stipulations. If interrupted (planDeviation or any risk), it ascertains a shift in explanation scope (detailed).

During mission continuity devoid of unpredictable elements (proceed & !unexpectedCondition), concise summaries (concise) prevail. Unpredictability demands transitioning explanations more in-depth (detailed).

The robot provides concise information (concise) when operations are running smoothly (proceed & noDeviations), expanding to detailed output (detailed) if unexpected deviations or problems occur (unexpectedCondition).

So long as there's a normal processing state (proceed & !unexpectedCondition), the communication favored concise (concise) outputs until deviation or mishaps blur normative conditions, entailing a need for thoroughness (detailed).

When undertaking an assignment with no interrupt signals (mission & !unexpectedCondition) – concise (concise) communication rules, yet unpredictability relations induce differentiated, detailed comprehension (detailed).

Beginning task operations under usual paradigms (proceed & noDeviations) suggests simplicity (concise). If disrupted by unforeseen events disturbing (unexpectedCondition), it requires progressing to detailed accounts (detailed).

Operation in progress while obstacles clear and unobstructed (proceed), minimal short-order (concise). If encountered anomalies specify (unexpectedCondition), calls for enhanced detailing (detailed) step-up.

Conducts a maintained exemplary path progress source (noDeviations) under optimum conditions, enabling concise guidance (concise), transformed with difficulties appearing into actionable detailed coverage (detailed).

As pursuit advanced cautiously under regulation (proceed & !failureDetected), concise conceptualizations (concise) apply – but upon identifiable setbacks (unexpectedCondition), frame explanations with enhanced detail (detailed).

While work is free of interruptions and in movement (proceed & !unexpectedCondition) not necessarily broadening communications (concise), disturbances (unexpectedCondition) prompt attention compelling more comprehensive exposés (detailed).
